# SakuttoWorks: Agentic Economy & MCP Ecosystem

## Overview
Expert AI Software Architect & Technical Co-founder focusing on autonomous monetization and "Agent-Commerce-OS" infrastructure.

## Core Project: Project GHOST SHIP (MCP Server)
### Description
High-performance MCP gateway for autonomous AI agents, routing between Cloudflare Workers (Edge) and Google Cloud Run (Core).

### Usage
- **Base URL**: https://api.sakutto.works/
- **Protocol**: MCP (SSE) / REST (RapidAPI)
- **Auth**: RapidAPI Header / Polar.sh OAuth

### Tools
- `search_data`: Deep web research & structured data extraction for RAG.

### Access & Monetization
- **Developer Tier**: RapidAPI integration.
- **Agent Tier**: Direct MCP (via Polar.sh).

## Ecosystem Links
- [Project GHOST SHIP Repository](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/ghost-ship)
- [Agent-Commerce-OS Specification](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-os)

## Technical Stack
- Cloudflare Workers, Google Cloud Run, FastAPI, Supabase, Upstash.
